name: Deploy to Cloudflare Pages Now
description: Manually trigger: commit all changes and push to GitHub, which triggers GitHub Actions to build and deploy to Cloudflare Pages (insightpulse.pages.dev).

then.prompt:
The user wants to deploy now to Cloudflare Pages. Execute these steps using execute_pwsh:

1. git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" add -A
2. git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" commit -m "deploy: manual trigger from Kiro IDE" (skip if nothing to commit)
3. git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" push origin main
4. Inform the user: 'Pushed to GitHub! GitHub Actions is now building the frontend and deploying to Cloudflare Pages. Monitor progress at: https://github.com/P-V2705/INSIGHTPULSE/actions — live at https://insightpulse.pages.dev in ~60 seconds.'
